title: Behind the Scenes - Introduction to Artificial Intelligence with Brian Yu - Chapter 1 - Playing
summary: CS50 is Harvard University's introduction to computer science and artificial intelligence, taught by David J. Malan and featuring instructor Brian Yu. The course is available through multiple channels including edX, Harvard Extension School, and OpenCourseWare, with an active community across multiple social platforms.
writeup: This CS50 segment is the first chapter, "Playing," from Harvard's introduction to computer science and artificial intelligence, featuring instructor Brian Yu alongside David J. Malan. It sits within a course distributed through edX, Harvard Extension School, and OpenCourseWare, with an active presence across multiple social platforms. The chapter's listed concepts are game development, vector search, and AI economics.
